name: Dasatinib plus quercetin effects on endothelial telomere dysfunction in aged mice
summary: An aged-mouse intervention study testing whether intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin changes endothelial senescence, DNA damage, telomere dysfunction-induced foci, and telomere length.
model_system: Old C57BL/6 mice treated from 21 to 24 months of age
